triageFlags.title: No Credit Report Provided
triageFlags.description: Credit report is missing for this proposal, making it impossible to validate the applicant's details or perform a thorough risk assessment.
triageFlags.recommendation: Decline the application or request the credit report for full evaluation.
triageFlags.reasoning: Step 1 (Data Verification & Credit Analysis) is skipped due to the absence of a credit report. Without this, verifying the accuracy of the applicant's details and assessing their creditworthiness cannot be performed. Further steps will proceed but this is a critical issue.

triageFlags.title: Credit Score Does Not Qualify for Tier A
triageFlags.description: The applicant does not meet the minimum credit score for Tier A.
triageFlags.recommendation: Classify the applicant within Tier B as per the score band in policy.
triageFlags.reasoning: Policy Section 2.1 states that Tier A requires a credit score of 700 or higher. The applicant's score of 665 qualifies them for Tier B.

triageFlags.title: DTI Ratio Exceeds Tier B Threshold
triageFlags.description: The applicant's DTI is significantly below the Tier B threshold.
triageFlags.recommendation: No action needed for affordability; the DTI is in range.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to Policy Section 3.1, the maximum allowable DTI for Tier B (credit score range 620-699) is 40%. The calculated DTI of 8% is well within this limit, ensuring affordability.

triageFlags.title: LTV Exceeds Allowable Limit for Tier B Applicant
triageFlags.description: Loan-to-value ratio slightly exceeds maximum allowed under Tier B criteria.
triageFlags.recommendation: Consider reducing the advance or increasing the down payment to align with policy.
triageFlags.reasoning: Policy Section 4.1 states that Tier B applicants should not exceed an LTV of 100%. Calculated LTV of 67.97 Because of mismatch with 67.62
